creator: achriston

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
• Set up the Standard Neonatal Environment as shown in Chapter 2.1
  • Ensure, all devices are running and connected to the Network
  • Ensure, that the TAI-Server application is running on the notebook connected to the ASL-5000
  • Start the device
  • If not already done run all calibrations and tests in the “Preop check”-tab with the correct humidification type
  • Set the leakage valve to 20% (±5%) by using Vti and Vte of the IMT Flow Analyser (Vte = 0.8 * Vti). You can run “Vent Mode: Set Leakage for Neonatal” on https://medical-portal.hamilton.ch/apps/ait-mgmt/testCases/66/revisions/0 to set the leakage valve.
  • Run the last released version of the test case “[STBR] PPL.0002 Ventilation Mode (PSIMV+) neonatal automatic FULL” with the ID 102 on Medical Portal: AIT Management.
  • After the test is executed, export the test results and copy them into the Tables of the test-case.
testSectionDTOList.title: Test Preparation

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied PEEP and Pcontrol are tested while Psync is off.

The sequence for this test is:

(ASL) -> (Setup) -> (Exec) -> (Evaluation) -> (CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation
  • Waits for 20 seconds

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Asserts PEEP measured by the ventilator
  • Asserts peak pressure measured by the ventilator
  • Asserts PEEP measured by the flow analyser
  • Asserts peak pressure measured by the flow analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation
testSectionDTOList.title: PEEP and Pcontrol without Psync

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied PEEP and Pcontrol are tested while Psync is on. 

The sequence for this test is:

(ASL) -> (Setup) -> (Exec) -> (Evaluation) -> (CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation
  • Waits for 20 seconds

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Asserts PEEP measured by the ventilator
  • Asserts peak pressure measured by the ventilator
  • Asserts PEEP measured by the flow analyser
  • Asserts peak pressure measured by the flow analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation
testSectionDTOList.title: PEEP and Pcontrol with Psync

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied rate and inspiration time with TI-philosophy are tested. For each partial tests the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 20 seconds.
  • Stores the inspiration time measured by the flow-analyser in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER]

(Scripting)-Block: Multiplies the value in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER] by 1000 and stores it in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates the inspiration time measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the inspiration time in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: Rate and Inspiration Time with TI-Philosophy

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor Inspiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the minimal applied expiration/inspiration time is tested with PSync = Off. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for a given time interval for the ventilator tor each steady state.
  • Stores one measurement of the expiration/inspiration time measured by the Flow-Analyser.

(Scripting)-Block: Converts the measurement from the Flow-Analyzer from “s” to “ms”. Note: The value is multiplied due to insufficient capabilities of AIT to evaluate floating-point numbers.

(Evaluation)-Block: Compares the measurement to the expected value.

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: TexpMin (Psync Off)

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman: This test shows that the expiration phase of a mandatory machine-triggered breath can be terminated after 0.2 s.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin without patient effort

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
All patient breaths are detected. This shows that the expiration phase of a spontaneous patient-triggered breath can be terminated after 0.2 s. 

Here, the defined TI-max ventilator setting leads to the applied inspiration phase time.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin with patient effort Texp = 0.2s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: If first measurement is taken, while trigger was not detected, take the second measurement
Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Only each 2nd patient effort is detected. This shows that patient efforts inside the TexpMin-window are ineffective.

Here, the defined TI-max ventilator setting leads to the applied inspiration phase time.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin with ineffective patient effort Texp = 1.05s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin without patient effort

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied time of the minimal-inspiration state of a ETS-controlled spontaneous breath is tested with both Psync-settings, each with Ti = 0.3. TinspMin is equal to 0.1s.

The sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets the ASL to have appropriate patient breathing. The spontaneous breath should be as short as possible, such that it switches to expiration phase exactly after TinspMin. 

(Setup)-Block:

  • Sets the ventilator settings including Psync = On or Off, ETS = 80 % and Ti = 0.3s
  • Sets the ventilator rate to 1 b/min to avoid that  time-controlled mandatory breaths influence the test.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits 15s.
  • Records the measured inspiration time of two breaths read by the Ventilator and the Flow Analyser.

(Scripting)-Block:

  • Takes the measurement with the lower value.
  • Compares the measurement to the expected value of TinspMin + 10ms
  • Store the result of the comparison

(Evaluation)-Block: Evaluates the result

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: TinspMin

V_TI= V_TI_2 if V_TI > V_TI_2 else V_TI
